title: Slovakian Garlic Pork Tenderloin
description: A flavorful and savory dish inspired by Slovakian cuisine, featuring garlic and tender pork. Perfect for a weekend dinner.
instructions: Season the pork tenderloin with salt, black pepper, and Slovakian paprika.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the pork tenderloin until browned on all sides, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer the pork to a baking sheet and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until cooked through.
While the pork is cooking, mince the garlic and sauté it in the skillet until fragrant.
Remove the pork from the oven and let it rest for 5 minutes before slicing.
Serve the pork with the garlic sauce spooned over the top, garnished with chopped parsley if desired.
